title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・『悔しい』

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I lost!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Reporting results. I have placed in the race but
failed to defeat either of my rivals.
choice_data_list: You can learn from this experience!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, thank you. And also, I am terribly sorry.
Trainer...

She looks at me with a vaguely lost expression. I
can't help but worry about her health.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I feel as though I might run off at any moment if I
fail to restrain myself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My jaw is clenching of its own volition, and
negative emotions are rising within me, not unlike
an uncontrolled wildfire.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
System controls are malfunctioning. Emergency
maintenance required.

Seeing Mihono Bourbon's panicked demeanor, I
can't help but burst out laughing.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I don't understand your reaction.
choice_data_list: What you're feeling right now is frustration.
What you're feeling right now is frustration.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: "Frustration"?

I tell her how most people feel happy when they
win and frustrated when they lose.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Winning creates "happiness." Losing creates
"frustration." New knowledge acquired.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That explains my current status.

Mihono Bourbon places a hand on her chest, as if
to physically check her emotions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This "frustration" feels hot inside me. However, it
is not the only thing I feel.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My "desire to win" is also growing at an
exponential rate.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I... I want to compete against even
stronger opponents.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: For example... Tokai Teio!

As she is now, Mihono Bourbon could certainly
rival Tokai Teio.

But Tokai Teio's currently recovering from an
injury, so I try to think of the race she'll most
likely enter after healing.
choice_data_list: Then our next stop is the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So that's Mihono Bourbon!

And so, a new battle begins. We put our all into
daily training once more as we head for the Japan
Cup!
